authentication.description: API key must be included in the x-api-key header for all endpoints except /api/status and /api/docs

endpoints.description: Get file system structure

requiredParameters.name: clientId
requiredParameters.description: The ID of the Foundry client to connect to

optionalParameters.name: path
optionalParameters.description: The path to retrieve (relative to source)

optionalParameters.name: source
optionalParameters.description: The source directory to use (data, systems, modules, etc.)

optionalParameters.name: recursive
optionalParameters.description: Whether to recursively list all subdirectories

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Upload a file to Foundry's file system (handles both base64 and binary data)

requiredParameters.name: clientId
requiredParameters.description: The ID of the Foundry client to connect to

requiredParameters.name: path
requiredParameters.description: The directory path to upload to

requiredParameters.name: filename
requiredParameters.description: The filename to save as

optionalParameters.name: source
optionalParameters.description: The source directory to use (data, systems, modules, etc.)

optionalParameters.name: mimeType
optionalParameters.description: The MIME type of the file

optionalParameters.name: overwrite
optionalParameters.description: Whether to overwrite an existing file

optionalParameters.name: fileData
optionalParameters.description: Base64 encoded file data (if sending as JSON) 250MB limit

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Download a file from Foundry's file system

requiredParameters.name: clientId
requiredParameters.description: The ID of the Foundry client to connect to

requiredParameters.name: path
requiredParameters.description: The full path to the file to download

optionalParameters.name: source
optionalParameters.description: The source directory to use (data, systems, modules, etc.)

optionalParameters.name: format
optionalParameters.description: The format to return the file in (binary, base64)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Create a handshake token for the client to use for secure authentication

requiredParameters.name: x-api-key
requiredParameters.description: API key header

requiredParameters.name: x-foundry-url
requiredParameters.description: Foundry URL header

requiredParameters.name: x-username
requiredParameters.description: Username header

optionalParameters.name: x-world-name
optionalParameters.description: World name header

endpoints.description: Start a headless Foundry session using puppeteer

requiredParameters.name: handshakeToken
requiredParameters.description: The token received from session-handshake

requiredParameters.name: encryptedPassword
requiredParameters.description: Password encrypted with the public key

requiredParameters.name: x-api-key
requiredParameters.description: API key header

endpoints.description: Stop a headless Foundry session

requiredParameters.name: sessionId
requiredParameters.description: The ID of the session to end

requiredParameters.name: x-api-key
requiredParameters.description: API key header

endpoints.description: Get all active headless Foundry sessions

requiredParameters.name: x-api-key
requiredParameters.description: API key header

endpoints.description: Get actor sheet HTML This endpoint retrieves the HTML for an actor sheet based on the provided UUID or selected actor. Only works on Foundry version 12.

requiredParameters.name: clientId
requiredParameters.description: The ID of the Foundry client to connect to

optionalParameters.name: uuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the entity to get the sheet for

optionalParameters.name: selected
optionalParameters.description: Whether to get the sheet for the selected entity

optionalParameters.name: actor
optionalParameters.description: Whether to get the sheet for the selected token's actor if selected is true

optionalParameters.name: format
optionalParameters.description: The format to return the sheet in (html, json)

optionalParameters.name: scale
optionalParameters.description: The initial scale of the sheet

optionalParameters.name: tab
optionalParameters.description: The active tab index to open

optionalParameters.name: darkMode
optionalParameters.description: Whether to use dark mode for the sheet

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: sceneId
optionalParameters.description: Scene ID to query (defaults to the active scene)

optionalParameters.name: documentId
optionalParameters.description: Specific document ID to retrieve

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Get chat messages Retrieves chat messages from the Foundry world with optional pagination and filtering.

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: limit
optionalParameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 10)

optionalParameters.name: offset
optionalParameters.description: Number of messages to skip for pagination

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

optionalParameters.name: chatType
optionalParameters.description: Foundry chat message type (0=OOC, 1=IC, 2=Emote, 3=Whisper, 4=Roll). Named chatType to avoid collision with WS message type field.

optionalParameters.name: speaker
optionalParameters.description: Filter messages by speaker name or actor ID

endpoints.description: Send a chat message Creates a new chat message in the Foundry world.

requiredParameters.name: content
requiredParameters.description: The message content (supports HTML)

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: whisper
optionalParameters.description: Array of user IDs to whisper the message to

optionalParameters.name: speaker
optionalParameters.description: Actor ID to use as the message speaker

optionalParameters.name: alias
optionalParameters.description: Display name alias for the speaker

optionalParameters.name: chatType
optionalParameters.description: Foundry chat message type (0=OOC, 1=IC, 2=Emote, 3=Whisper, 4=Roll). Named chatType to avoid collision with WS message type field.

optionalParameters.name: flavor
optionalParameters.description: Flavor text displayed above the message content

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Delete a specific chat message Deletes a chat message by its ID. Only the message author or a GM can delete messages.

requiredParameters.name: messageId
requiredParameters.description: ID of the chat message to delete

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Clear all chat messages Flushes all chat message history. Only GMs can perform this action.

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Subscribe to real-time chat events via Server-Sent Events (SSE) Opens a persistent SSE connection that streams chat events (create, update, delete) as they occur in the Foundry world.

requiredParameters.name: clientId
requiredParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: speaker
optionalParameters.description: Filter events by speaker name or actor ID

optionalParameters.name: type
optionalParameters.description: Filter events by chat message type (0=OOC, 1=IC, 2=Emote, 3=Whisper, 4=Roll)

optionalParameters.name: whisperOnly
optionalParameters.description: Only receive whispered messages

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Get all connected clients for the authenticated API key Returns a list of all currently connected Foundry VTT clients associated with the provided API key, including their connection details and world information.

Get detailed information for a specific D&D 5e actor. Retrieves comprehensive details about an actor including stats, inventory, spells, features, and other character information based on the requested details array.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor

requiredParameters.name: details
requiredParameters.description: Array of detail types to retrieve (e.g., ["resources", "items", "spells", "features"])

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Modify the charges for a specific item owned by an actor. Increases or decreases the charges/uses of an item in an actor's inventory. Useful for consumable items like potions, scrolls, or charged magic items.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor who owns the item

requiredParameters.name: amount
requiredParameters.description: The amount to modify charges by (positive or negative)

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: itemUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the specific item (optional if itemName provided)

optionalParameters.name: itemName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the item if UUID not provided (optional if itemUuid provided)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Use a general ability for an actor. Triggers the use of any ability, feature, spell, or item for an actor. This is a generic endpoint that can handle various types of abilities.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor using the ability

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: abilityUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the specific ability (optional if abilityName provided)

optionalParameters.name: abilityName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the ability if UUID not provided (optional if abilityUuid provided)

optionalParameters.name: targetUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the target for the ability (optional)

optionalParameters.name: targetName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the target if UUID not provided (optional)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Use a class or racial feature for an actor. Activates class features (like Action Surge, Rage) or racial features (like Dragonborn Breath Weapon) for a character.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor using the feature

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: abilityUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the specific feature (optional if abilityName provided)

optionalParameters.name: abilityName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the feature if UUID not provided (optional if abilityUuid provided)

optionalParameters.name: targetUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the target for the feature (optional)

optionalParameters.name: targetName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the target if UUID not provided (optional)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Cast a spell for an actor. Casts a spell from the actor's spell list, consuming spell slots as appropriate. Handles cantrips, leveled spells, and spell-like abilities.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor casting the spell

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: abilityUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the specific spell (optional if abilityName provided)

optionalParameters.name: abilityName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the spell if UUID not provided (optional if abilityUuid provided)

optionalParameters.name: targetUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the target for the spell (optional)

optionalParameters.name: targetName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the target if UUID not provided (optional)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Use an item for an actor. Activates an item from the actor's inventory, such as drinking a potion, using a magic item, or activating equipment with special properties.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor using the item

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: abilityUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the specific item (optional if abilityName provided)

optionalParameters.name: abilityName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the item if UUID not provided (optional if abilityUuid provided)

optionalParameters.name: targetUuid
optionalParameters.description: The UUID of the target for the item (optional)

optionalParameters.name: targetName
optionalParameters.description: The name of the target if UUID not provided (optional)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Perform a short rest for an actor. Triggers the D&D 5e short rest workflow including hit dice recovery, class feature resets, and HP recovery.

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: actorUuid
optionalParameters.description: UUID of the actor to rest (optional if selected is true)

optionalParameters.name: selected
optionalParameters.description: Use the currently selected token's actor

optionalParameters.name: autoHD
optionalParameters.description: Automatically spend hit dice during short rest

optionalParameters.name: autoHDThreshold
optionalParameters.description: HP threshold below which to auto-spend hit dice (0-1 as fraction of max HP)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Perform a long rest for an actor. Triggers the D&D 5e long rest workflow including full HP recovery, spell slot restoration, hit dice recovery, and feature resets.

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: actorUuid
optionalParameters.description: UUID of the actor to rest (optional if selected is true)

optionalParameters.name: selected
optionalParameters.description: Use the currently selected token's actor

optionalParameters.name: newDay
optionalParameters.description: Whether the long rest marks a new day (default: true)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Roll a skill check for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e skill check with all applicable modifiers including proficiency, expertise, Jack of All Trades, and conditional bonuses.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor rolling the check

requiredParameters.name: skill
requiredParameters.description: Skill abbreviation (e.g., "acr", "ath", "ste", "prc")

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: advantage
optionalParameters.description: Roll with advantage

optionalParameters.name: disadvantage
optionalParameters.description: Roll with disadvantage

optionalParameters.name: bonus
optionalParameters.description: Extra bonus formula to add (e.g., "1d4", "+2")

optionalParameters.name: createChatMessage
optionalParameters.description: Whether to post the roll to chat (default: true)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Roll an ability saving throw for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e ability saving throw with all applicable modifiers.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor rolling the save

requiredParameters.name: ability
requiredParameters.description: Ability abbreviation (e.g., "str", "dex", "con", "int", "wis", "cha")

optionalParameters.name: clientId
optionalParameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world

optionalParameters.name: advantage
optionalParameters.description: Roll with advantage

optionalParameters.name: disadvantage
optionalParameters.description: Roll with disadvantage

optionalParameters.name: bonus
optionalParameters.description: Extra bonus formula to add (e.g., "1d4", "+2")

optionalParameters.name: createChatMessage
optionalParameters.description: Whether to post the roll to chat (default: true)

optionalParameters.name: userId
optionalParameters.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

endpoints.description: Roll an ability check for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e ability check (raw ability test, not a skill check) with all applicable modifiers.

requiredParameters.name: actorUuid
requiredParameters.description: UUID of the actor rolling the check

requiredParameters.name: ability

endpoints.description: Register a new user account Creates a new user with the provided email and password. Returns the user's API key.

requiredParameters.description: The user's password (min 8 chars, must include upper, lower, number)

endpoints.description: Log in with email and password Authenticates a user and returns their account details including API key.

requiredParameters.name: email
requiredParameters.description: The user's email address

requiredParameters.name: password
requiredParameters.description: The user's password

endpoints.description: Regenerate API key Generates a new API key for the authenticated user. Requires email and password confirmation.

requiredParameters.name: email
requiredParameters.description: The user's email address

requiredParameters.name: password
requiredParameters.description: The user's password

endpoints.description: Get user data Retrieves the authenticated user's account details and usage information.
Export user data Exports all stored user data for GDPR data portability compliance.
Delete user account Permanently deletes the user's account and cancels any active subscriptions. Requires email confirmation and password verification.

requiredParameters.name: confirmEmail
requiredParameters.description: The user's email address (must match account email)

requiredParameters.name: password
requiredParameters.description: The user's password for verification

endpoints.description: Change password while logged in Allows an authenticated user to change their password by providing their current password and a new one.

requiredParameters.name: currentPassword
requiredParameters.description: The user's current password

requiredParameters.name: newPassword
requiredParameters.description: The new password (min 8 chars, must include upper, lower, number)

endpoints.description: Request a password reset Sends a password reset email if the account exists. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

requiredParameters.name: email
requiredParameters.description: The email address associated with the account

endpoints.description: Reset password with token Resets the user's password using a valid reset token from the forgot-password flow.

requiredParameters.name: token
requiredParameters.description: The password reset token from the email

requiredParameters.name: password
requiredParameters.description: The new password (min 8 chars, must include upper, lower, number)

endpoints.description: Validate a password reset token Checks whether a password reset token is still valid and unused.

requiredParameters.name: token
requiredParameters.description: The password reset token to validate

endpoints.description: Create a new scoped API key Creates a sub-key under the authenticated user's master key with optional scope restrictions.

requiredParameters.name: name
requiredParameters.description: Friendly name for the key

optionalParameters.name: scopedClientId
optionalParameters.description: Lock to specific Foundry client ID

optionalParameters.name: scopedUserId
optionalParameters.description: Lock to specific Foundry user ID

optionalParameters.name: dailyLimit
optionalParameters.description: Per-key daily request cap

optionalParameters.name: expiresAt
optionalParameters.description: Expiry timestamp (ISO 8601)

optionalParameters.name: foundryUrl
optionalParameters.description: Foundry instance URL for headless sessions

optionalParameters.name: foundryUsername
optionalParameters.description: Foundry login username

optionalParameters.name: foundryPassword
optionalParameters.description: Foundry login password (encrypted at rest)

endpoints.description: List all scoped API keys Returns all scoped keys for the authenticated user. Keys are masked.
Delete a scoped API key Permanently deletes a scoped key.

requiredParameters.name: id
requiredParameters.description: The scoped key ID
